com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.cardreader

Class CardReaderParameters

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.cardreader.CardReaderParameters
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ExtCardReaderParameters

    public class CardReaderParameters
extends java.lang.Object
    Parameters used to open card readers.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      CardReaderParameters() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      CardSearchMode getCardSearchMode()
      Gets the current card search mode.
      ContactCardSlot[] getCardSlots()
      Gets the contact card slots to be search for.
      ContactlessCardType[] getContactlessCardTypes()
      Gets contactless card types.
      byte[] getTypeFParameters()
      Gets parameters for type F card.
      byte[] getTypeVParameters()
      Gets parameters for type V card.
      boolean isVerifyTrack()
      Whether or not to verify track data.
      void setCardSearchMode(CardSearchMode cardSearchMode)
      Sets the card search mode for the next card detection process.
      void setCardSlots(ContactCardSlot[] cardSlots)
      Sets the contact card slots to be search for
      void setContactlessCardTypes(ContactlessCardType[] contactlessCardTypes)
      Sets expected contactless card types.
      void setTypeFParameters(byte[] typeFParameters)
      Sets parameters for type F card.
      void setTypeVParameters(byte[] typeVParameters)
      Sets parameters for type V card.
      void setVerifyTrack(boolean verifyTrack)
      Sets whether or not to verify track data.

      • CardReaderParameters

        public CardReaderParameters()

    • Method Detail

      • getContactlessCardTypes

        public ContactlessCardType[] getContactlessCardTypes()
        Gets contactless card types.
        Returns:
        Contactless card types. See ContactlessCardType.

      • setContactlessCardTypes

        public void setContactlessCardTypes(ContactlessCardType[] contactlessCardTypes)
        Sets expected contactless card types.
        Parameters:
        contactlessCardTypes - Contactless card types. See ContactlessCardType.

      • isVerifyTrack

        public boolean isVerifyTrack()
        Whether or not to verify track data.
        Returns:
        Whether or not to verify track data. It is 'true' by default.

      • setVerifyTrack

        public void setVerifyTrack(boolean verifyTrack)
        Sets whether or not to verify track data.
        Parameters:
        verifyTrack - Whether or not to verify track data. It is 'true' by default.

      • getTypeFParameters

        public byte[] getTypeFParameters()
        Gets parameters for type F card.
        Returns:
        Parameters for type F card.

      • setTypeFParameters

        public void setTypeFParameters(byte[] typeFParameters)
        Sets parameters for type F card.
        Parameters:
        typeFParameters - Parameters for type F card.

      • getTypeVParameters

        public byte[] getTypeVParameters()
        Gets parameters for type V card.
        Returns:
        Parameters for type V card.

      • setTypeVParameters

        public void setTypeVParameters(byte[] typeVParameters)
        Sets parameters for type V card.
        Parameters:
        typeVParameters - Parameters for type V card.

      • getCardSlots

        public ContactCardSlot[] getCardSlots()
        Gets the contact card slots to be search for.
        Returns:
        The contact card slots to be search for.

      • setCardSlots

        public void setCardSlots(ContactCardSlot[] cardSlots)
        Sets the contact card slots to be search for
        Parameters:
        cardSlots - Contact card slots to be search for, default is ContactCardSlot.IC1.

      • getCardSearchMode

        public CardSearchMode getCardSearchMode()
        Gets the current card search mode.
        Returns:
        The current card search mode.

      • setCardSearchMode

        public void setCardSearchMode(CardSearchMode cardSearchMode)
        Sets the card search mode for the next card detection process.
        Parameters:
        cardSearchMode - The card search mode for the next card detection process.See CardSearchMode.
